ship.releaseNotes:
### Blackwell Ops release

Pre-built CUDA engines for Ampere, Ada, and Blackwell.

- GGML Master (core NSIS)
- Frontier: CUDA 13.3 (VS2026)
- Stable: CUDA 12.8 (VS2022)

Optional forks (Tom TQ, bee-llama, etc.) ship as separate provider packs.
ship.appOnlyReleaseNotes:
### App update (`Blackwell-Ops-App-v*.7z`)

Lean portable pack (~5 MB) - **UI, core templates, plugin catalog, bundled 7z**.

Refreshes the **engine catalog** (Tom TQ, bee-llama, etc.) - install optional engines from Config - UPDATES. They appear in PROVIDERS after download.

**How to apply:** in-app **UPDATE** menu (download, extract, restart). Keeps existing engines under `runtime/`.

**First install?** Use **Full install** (Setup.exe) from Updates catalog.
ship.fullBundleReleaseNotes:
### Full install (NSIS Setup)

Core installer: **app + GGML Master engines** (Frontier + Stable).

Also attaches lean App `.7z` and per-provider `.7z` packs (Tom TQ, bee-llama, etc.) for optional engines.

**Choose this when:** first-time install or you need a full Master engine refresh.
ship.providerReleaseNotes:
### Engine pack update (`{provider}-{profile}.7z`)

Optional engine runtime - extract via Config - UPDATES.

Stop any running engine for that provider before updating.
